creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report. Without any information we are unable to resolve issues.

Please re-open this issue at the upstream issue tracker: https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/issues providing at least the following:

- Exact FreeBSD version (uname -a output)
- Exact pkg version
- Kernel configuration if not GENERIC
- pkg version -v output
- Summary and backtrace output of the segfault (Using gdb [1])

[1] https://www.freshports.org/devel/gdb/
